dataset_overview.title: Dataset Overview & Target Variable
dataset_overview.plotly:
fig = px.histogram(df, x='streams', nbins=50, title='Distribution of Streams')
fig.update_layout(xaxis_title='Streams', yaxis_title='Count')
fig.show()
dataset_overview.matplotlib:
plt.hist(df['streams'], bins=50)
plt.title('Distribution of Streams')
plt.xlabel('Streams')
plt.ylabel('Count')
plt.show()
dataset_overview.seaborn:
sns.histplot(df['streams'], bins=50)
plt.title('Distribution of Streams')
plt.xlabel('Streams')
plt.ylabel('Count')
plt.show()

missing_values.title: Missing Value Analysis
missing_values.plotly:
cols = ['key', 'in_shazam_charts', 'streams']
missing_pct = df[cols].isnull().mean() * 100
missing_pct.index = ['key', 'in_shazam_charts', 'streams (noise)']
fig = go.Figure(data=[go.Bar(x=missing_pct.index, y=missing_pct.values, text=[f'{v:.2f}%' for v in missing_pct.values], textposition='outside')])
fig.update_layout(title='Missing Values Distribution', yaxis_title='Percentage (%)')
fig.show()
missing_values.matplotlib:
cols = ['key', 'in_shazam_charts', 'streams']
missing_pct = df[cols].isnull().mean() * 100
missing_pct.index = ['key', 'in_shazam_charts', 'streams (noise)']
missing_pct.plot(kind='bar')
plt.ylabel('Percentage (%)')
plt.title('Missing Values Distribution')
plt.show()
missing_values.seaborn:
cols = ['key', 'in_shazam_charts', 'streams']
missing_pct = df[cols].isnull().mean() * 100
missing_pct.index = ['key', 'in_shazam_charts', 'streams (noise)']
sns.barplot(x=missing_pct.index, y=missing_pct.values)
plt.ylabel('Percentage (%)')
plt.title('Missing Values Distribution')
plt.show()

descriptive_stats.title: Descriptive Statistics
descriptive_stats.plotly:
summary = df.describe().T[['mean', '50%', 'std', 'min', 'max']]
fig = go.Figure(data=[go.Table(header=dict(values=['Feature', 'Mean', '50% (Med)', 'Std Dev', 'Min', 'Max']), cells=dict(values=[summary.index, summary['mean'].round(2), summary['50%'].round(2), summary['std'].round(2), summary['min'].round(2), summary['max'].round(2)]))])
fig.show()

distribution_scanning.title: Distribution Scanning
distribution_scanning.plotly:
fig = go.Figure()
fig.add_trace(go.Histogram(x=df['danceability_%'], name='Danceability', opacity=0.7))
fig.add_trace(go.Histogram(x=df['energy_%'], name='Energy', opacity=0.7))
fig.add_trace(go.Histogram(x=df['valence_%'], name='Valence', opacity=0.5))
fig.update_layout(barmode='overlay', title='Detailed Numerical Distributions (Audio Features)', xaxis_title='Feature Value (%)', yaxis_title='Frequency')
fig.show()
distribution_scanning.matplotlib:
df[['danceability_%', 'energy_%', 'valence_%']].hist(figsize=(10, 4), bins=30)
plt.suptitle('Detailed Numerical Distributions (Audio Features)')
plt.show()
distribution_scanning.seaborn:
sns.histplot(df['danceability_%'], color='green', label='Danceability', kde=True)
sns.histplot(df['energy_%'], color='black', label='Energy', kde=True)
sns.histplot(df['valence_%'], color='lightgreen', label='Valence', kde=True)
plt.legend()
plt.title('Detailed Numerical Distributions (Audio Features)')
plt.xlabel('Feature Value (%)')
plt.ylabel('Frequency')
plt.show()

correlation_analysis.title: Correlation Analysis
correlation_analysis.plotly:
cols = ['danceability_%', 'valence_%', 'energy_%', 'acousticness_%', 'streams']
fig = px.imshow(df[cols].corr(), text_auto=True, color_continuous_scale='RdBu', origin='lower')
fig.update_layout(title='Correlation Heatmap')
fig.show()
correlation_analysis.seaborn:
cols = ['danceability_%', 'valence_%', 'energy_%', 'acousticness_%', 'streams']
sns.heatmap(df[cols].corr(), annot=True, cmap='coolwarm', center=0)
plt.title('Correlation Heatmap')
plt.show()

artist_impact.title: Artist Impact Analysis
artist_impact.plotly:
top_artists = df.groupby('artist(s)_name')['streams'].sum().nlargest(10).sort_values()
fig = px.bar(x=top_artists.values, y=top_artists.index, orientation='h', title='Top 10 Artists by Total Streams')
fig.update_layout(xaxis_title='Total Streams', yaxis_title='Artist')
fig.show()
artist_impact.matplotlib:
df.groupby('artist(s)_name')['streams'].sum().nlargest(10).sort_values().plot(kind='barh', figsize=(8, 5))
plt.title('Top 10 Artists by Total Streams')
plt.xlabel('Total Streams')
plt.show()
artist_impact.seaborn:
top_artists = df.groupby('artist(s)_name')['streams'].sum().nlargest(10).sort_values()
sns.barplot(x=top_artists.values, y=top_artists.index)
plt.title('Top 10 Artists by Total Streams')
plt.xlabel('Total Streams')
plt.ylabel('Artist')
plt.show()

temporal_trends.title: Temporal Trends & Seasonality
temporal_trends.plotly:
yearly = df.groupby('released_year')[['danceability_%', 'energy_%', 'valence_%']].mean().reset_index()
fig = px.line(yearly, x='released_year', y=['danceability_%', 'energy_%', 'valence_%'], title='Music Features Trend Over Time')
fig.update_layout(xaxis_title='Year', yaxis_title='Average Value (%)')
fig.show()
temporal_trends.matplotlib:
yearly = df.groupby('released_year')[['danceability_%', 'energy_%', 'valence_%']].mean()
yearly.plot(figsize=(10, 5))
plt.title('Music Features Trend Over Time')
plt.xlabel('Year')
plt.ylabel('Average Value (%)')
plt.show()
temporal_trends.seaborn:
yearly = df.groupby('released_year')[['danceability_%', 'energy_%', 'valence_%']].mean().reset_index()
sns.lineplot(data=yearly, x='released_year', y='danceability_%', label='Danceability')
sns.lineplot(data=yearly, x='released_year', y='energy_%', label='Energy')
sns.lineplot(data=yearly, x='released_year', y='valence_%', label='Valence')
plt.title('Music Features Trend Over Time')
plt.xlabel('Year')
plt.ylabel('Average Value (%)')
plt.show()

success_factors.title: Success Factors Analysis
success_factors.plotly:
fig = px.scatter(df, x='in_spotify_playlists', y='streams', title='Streams vs Spotify Playlists', opacity=0.6)
fig.update_layout(xaxis_title='In Spotify Playlists', yaxis_title='Total Streams')
fig.show()
success_factors.matplotlib:
plt.scatter(df['in_spotify_playlists'], df['streams'], alpha=0.6)
plt.title('Streams vs Spotify Playlists')
plt.xlabel('In Spotify Playlists')
plt.ylabel('Total Streams')
plt.show()
success_factors.seaborn:
sns.regplot(data=df, x='in_spotify_playlists', y='streams', scatter_kws={'alpha': 0.5})
plt.title('Streams vs Spotify Playlists')
plt.xlabel('In Spotify Playlists')
plt.ylabel('Total Streams')
plt.show()

audio_profiles.title: Audio Profiles & Sonic Mood
audio_profiles.plotly:
fig = px.scatter(df, x='valence_%', y='energy_%', size='danceability_%', color='mode', hover_name='track_name', title='The Sonic Mood of 2023: Energy vs Valence')
fig.add_vline(x=df['valence_%'].mean(), line_dash='dash', line_color='gray')
fig.add_hline(y=df['energy_%'].mean(), line_dash='dash', line_color='gray')
fig.show()
audio_profiles.matplotlib:
plt.scatter(df['valence_%'], df['energy_%'], s=df['danceability_%'] * 2, alpha=0.6)
plt.axvline(df['valence_%'].mean(), linestyle='--', color='gray')
plt.axhline(df['energy_%'].mean(), linestyle='--', color='gray')
plt.title('The Sonic Mood of 2023: Energy vs Valence')
plt.xlabel('Valence (%)')
plt.ylabel('Energy (%)')
plt.show()
audio_profiles.seaborn:
sns.scatterplot(data=df, x='valence_%', y='energy_%', size='danceability_%', hue='mode', alpha=0.7)
plt.axvline(df['valence_%'].mean(), linestyle='--', color='gray')
plt.axhline(df['energy_%'].mean(), linestyle='--', color='gray')
plt.title('The Sonic Mood of 2023: Energy vs Valence')
plt.xlabel('Valence (%)')
plt.ylabel('Energy (%)')
plt.show()
